Resolved in manta-storage commit 7c5c5fc on surface-s3 via workspace OpenSpec change CHG-200. fdb_smoke/fdb_rate examples separately tracked as workspace beads-5l6q.

wontfix: mantad's 400 matches real AWS S3 behavior — x-amz-content-sha256 is a mandatory header for SigV4 S3 requests; the test omits it on every probe. When x-amz-content-sha256 is included the auth path returns spec-compliant 403 InvalidAccessKeyId / SignatureDoesNotMatch. Test should be updated upstream.

wontfix: mantad anonymous-read path works correctly when bucket is properly configured (PAB relaxed + public-read bucket policy → 200). Live-verified. Both test failures are test-side bugs: legacy Manta-URL format + missing PAB-relax step.

FIXED: shipped 2026-06-04. Implementation in commit 2d4cbd56 on surface-s3. New endpoint GET /v1/silos/{silo_id}/tenants/{tenant_id}/storage/buckets live-verified against 192.168.1.182 (tritond sha256 731f12fdc68fbe19fd4e16f93ac5ae63fd503b0d173c71e2bf2a655c5d51b333). Five integration tests in services/tritond/tests/tenant_storage_buckets.rs (anonymous_is_denied, non_root_in_silo_is_forbidden, unbound_tenant_returns_412_tenant_storage_unbound, cross_silo_probe_returns_404, bound_tenant_against_unreachable_mantad_surfaces_5xx). Live verify: flat list returns all-workspace buckets; tenant A scoped = []; tenant B scoped returns the 1 matching bucket with workspace t-a467b5c13a79494e8365859a96d1f291; cross-silo probe returns 404. StorageBucket.workspace field propagated end-to-end. Reuses Action::StorageBucketList (no Cedar bundle change needed). Unblocks Wave 1 follow-ups (nbdp/8imp/fydj/oei3) which can now use this as the reference pattern.

FIXED: shipped Wave 1 (commit f6918ddd on surface-s3). Live-verified against 192.168.1.182 (tritond sha256 8b4df0b3f49dccd8505740b99834e931133ef3027c7816658f540a9cb6be7543): new endpoint GET /v1/silos/{sid}/tenants/{tid}/storage/users returns only the tenant's workspace users (tenant 287a0abe: 3 users with workspace=t-287a0abece9f...; tenant a467b5c1: 1 user); cross-silo probe returns 404; StorageUser.workspace field propagated end-to-end. 5 new integration tests in services/tritond/tests/tenant_storage_users.rs all green. Closes one of krwz family.

FIXED: shipped Wave 1 (commit f6918ddd). Live-verified: new endpoint GET /v1/silos/{sid}/tenants/{tid}/storage/users/{user}/access-keys returns only the tenant's keys with workspace populated; cross-tenant probe of same user-name returns 404 NotFound (mantad's workspace gate — exactly the non-disclosure contract the bug filed against); cross-silo: 404. Cross-tenant and cross-silo both 404. 7 new integration tests in services/tritond/tests/tenant_storage_policies.rs all green. Closes one of krwz family.
B2 executed 2026-06-04 15:05 UTC. fdbserver now ssd-2 engine. Tritond + mantad + fdbserver all up post-migration. Login with new root password verified. 69bg pending 24h soak.

Three-repo commits 97e82c5 / d1460bd6 / 146bf6c. 7/7 live contract matrix pass. 6/6 cargo test pass. mantad workspace gate + tritond _scope discard fix + new tenant-scoped endpoint + SPA wiring all deployed to 192.168.1.182. Closes the last leak in the krwz family.

Shipped 2026-06-04. services/tritond/tests/tenant_storage_isolation.rs: 34 tests covering 21 endpoints across both surfaces (16 tenant-scoped + 5 flat). All 411 tritond tests pass, zero regressions. Test logs confirm outgoing mantad URLs carry workspace=t-<uuid> for tenant-bound principals (the krwz fix is live and observable). Residual gap: B-scoped is a weak guard (cannot distinguish scope.workspace_name() being None from being Some via unreachable mantad). The strong version requires wiremock to inspect outgoing requests and is tracked as monitor-reef-qlti. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/bwt3-isolation-harness.md (nine-reviewers Approve round 2). Commit: 35c15dc0.

Shipped 2026-06-04. services/mantas3-prober/ — 5 src files + README + wiremock smoke (~2800 lines). 15 unit + 3 integration tests pass on build01 (RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=1.92, fdb envelope). Release build clean. All I1-I6 invariants + R1-R3 reliability mechanisms implemented per the round-2 plan. Workspace deps added: aws-sdk-s3 v1 (rustls), aws-config v1, aws-credential-types v1, hyper v1, hyper-util, http-body-util, prometheus 0.13, tracing-subscriber 'json' feature. R2 supervision uses hand-rolled hyper listener (not metrics-exporter-prometheus) so the listener task is supervisable via JoinHandle.await — addresses round-2 panel concern about library affordance. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/zy0v-slice1-prober.md. Commit: 9c13a148. Parent monitor-reef-zy0v stays open pending slices 2/3/4.

Shipped 2026-06-04 in manta-storage:surface-s3 commit bff646f. mantas3/cluster/src/cap_token_ext.rs (800+ lines) + InternalState/PeerClient/ClusterView/peer.rs wiring + mantad CLI args + telemetry registry accessor. 37/37 mantas3-cluster tests pass on build01 (RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=1.92, fdb feature). All round-1 + round-2 panel concerns folded: dedicated X-Manta-Capability header (not Authorization), 5-min TTL (not 60s — leaves margin against 60s clock-skew tolerance), cluster-service sentinel centralized to one constructor + one predicate, CapTokenPolicy bundles verifier/expectation/mode/metrics, 11 reason codes with structured 401 body + tracing event + labeled failures_total counter, Permissive-mode telemetry (mode_permissive gauge + permissive_allowed_total counter), env vars unified to MANTAD_* prefix. Backward-compat: cap_policy=None when MANTAD_CAP_TOKEN_KEY_PATH unset — matches pre-slice-1 behaviour for fresh deploys. PeerClient now mints via with_auth_opt(view.peer_auth()) at all 5 construction sites. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/f365-slice1-peer-cap-tokens.md.

Shipped 2026-06-04 across two repos:
- manta-storage:1dd6f6c (mantad-client adds CapTokenAuth + with_cap_auth + per-request mint).
- manta-storage:7a5c140 (mantad admin_auth accepts X-Manta-Capability alongside bearer/SigV4).

When MANTAD_CAP_TOKEN_KEY_PATH is set on tritond AND the same key file is provisioned on mantad, tritond's outbound admin RPCs carry X-Manta-Capability + bearer; mantad's admin path verifies the cap-token first. RFD 00014 §12-13 'tritond mints cap-tokens for internal callers' is now satisfied for the admin path.

All test suites pass: mantas3-cluster 37/37, mantad-client 32, tritond 57+ across handlers/sagas/scopes. Live verification on the rig pending. Parent monitor-reef-f365 stays open for slice 2 + 3 + 4.

~45 customer S3 verbs now mint a cap-token on every SigV4-verified request when MANTAD_CAP_TOKEN_KEY_PATH is configured. The minted token carries the resolved AccessKey's tenant context (silo_id/tenant_shard/region via the slice 2 prereq) + the verb's permission bitmask + bucket-scope CapabilityResource. mantas3-s3 lib tests pass 79/79.

VERIFY SIDE (Storage trait) is filed as a new bead — that's the natural slice 3 deliverable: change the Storage trait to accept the minted token and verify before serving. Once that lands, the customer data plane is RFD 00014 §12-13 compliant end-to-end (mint at gateway, verify at storage tier in-process).

The s3-handler integration (commits 3+4 from the plan) is filed as monitor-reef-abv2 — same plan, separate execution unit because of the 17-call-site sweep + EC helper signature changes + CopyObject source-side mint.

Commit 1fee1c1 (mantas3-s3 StorageSession integration: 16 call sites + EC/reclaim helper signature changes + CopyObject source-side mint + UploadPartCopy two-session pattern + Forbidden error mapper). Commit eac8758 (mantad startup wiring: MANTAD_STORAGE_AUTH_MODE flag + LocalVerifyingStorage construction + passthrough_active gauge + VerifyPolicy reusing slice-1 verifier). wontfix: test-rig artifact. The launcher scripts (tools/phase-c-deploy.sh + scripts/deploy-slice3-mantad.sh) only get exercised when running the whole stack in the global zone for testing. In production each component lives in its own zone where launch is driven by the SMF manifests baked into the zone images (see images/triton-tritond/build.sh + images/triton-fdb/build.sh + images/triton-api/smf/ — landed via main merge 4a33e0ea). The stale-launcher gotcha won't manifest in the zone-deploy shape, so the right fix is to migrate the test rig to zone-image deploys rather than patch the GZ scripts. Tracked as an opportunistic cleanup; file a fresh bead if anyone hits this on the test rig again.

Fixed. mantad's dispatch_public now evaluates request Origin + ACRM against the bucket's persisted CORS rules instead of returning a permissive-for-dev 204 across the board. Preflight returns 200 with matched rule's headers / 403 with no CORS headers when no rule matches. Non-preflight responses emit CORS headers only when a rule matches the origin. Committed in manta-storage:surface-s3 bb03a38. Verified end-to-end on the rig: all 7 previously-failing s3_suite cors_* tests flip to PASS (88→95 total), 12 new unit tests pass on build01, no regressions in the rest of the suite.

Fixed. mantad now emits x-amz-meta-sequencer (16 lowercase hex) on PUT/GET/HEAD/Copy responses. Strictly monotone within a single mantad process via manta_common::sequencer::next_sequencer (wall-clock base + AtomicU64 counter). Persisted in ObjectMeta with #[serde(default)] so older rows deserialize cleanly. Committed in manta-storage:surface-s3 9a377f2. Verified on the rig: all 3 s3_suite sequencer tests flip to PASS (object_get_returns_sequencer_header, two_puts_have_increasing_sequencers, distinct_keys_have_distinct_sequencers); workspace totals 95→98 passing, no regressions. Cross-node FDB-coherent sequencers (versionstamp / raft apply-index) are out of scope for this commit — module docs flag them as a future follow-up when multi-node mantad ships.
